text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A beach bathed in sunlight... What a<n>perfect setting
for the prelude of the<n>battle to determine the
strongest<n>generation!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the heroes of the Golden<n>Generation are
taking part in this very<n>camp, and I am destined to
overthrow<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Onward, Opera O opera troupe! We<n>shall prevail in
this water dousing<n>skirmish and simultaneously
bolster<n>our own forces!
